page_content:
Prerequisite: CCJS300 and CCJS105.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

CCJS455 Dynamics of Planned Change in Criminal Justice | (3 Credits) An examination of conceptual and practical issues related to planned change in criminal justice. Emphasis on the development of innovative ideas using a research and development approach to change. Prerequisite: CCJS300.
